name: PreviewWrapper
source_code:
// src/components/PreviewWrapper.astro --- import { Hash } from '@lucide/astro' import type { ComponentPreview as ComponentPreviewType } from '../types/component' import ComponentPreview from './ComponentPreview.astro' import PreviewBreakpoints from './PreviewBreakpoints.astro' import PreviewCopy from './PreviewCopy.astro' import PreviewDetails from './PreviewDetails.astro' import PreviewDirection from './PreviewDirection.astro' import PreviewRefs from './PreviewRefs.astro' import PreviewView from './PreviewView.astro' const breakpoints = [ { name: 'Mobile', width: '340px' }, { name: 'SM', width: '640px' }, { name: 'MD', width: '768px' }, { name: 'LG', width: '1024px' }, { name: 'Full', width: '100%' }, ] interface Props { component: ComponentPreviewType category: string slug: string wrapper: string } const { component, category, slug, wrapper } = Astro.props const { contributors, dark, id, index, title, description = '', plugins = [] } = component const src = dark ? `/examples/${category}/${slug}/${index}-dark.html` : `/examples/${category}/${slug}/${index}.html` ---

{title}

visual_summary: PreviewWrapper is a component that displays a preview of a component. It is used in documentation websites to showcase how a component looks like in different scenarios. It includes features like breakpoints, direction, copy, and view.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: PreviewWrapper
Description: PreviewWrapper is a component that displays a preview of a component. It is used in documentation websites to showcase how a component looks like in different scenarios. It includes features like breakpoints, direction, copy, and view.
Style: light, default
Interactions: responsive, hover
Tags: documentation, preview, component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/PreviewWrapper.astro
---
import { Hash } from '@lucide/astro'
import type { ComponentPreview as ComponentPreviewType } from '../types/component'

import ComponentPreview from './ComponentPreview.astro'
import PreviewBreakpoints from './PreviewBreakpoints.astro'
import PreviewCopy from './PreviewCopy.astro'
import PreviewDetails from './PreviewDetails.astro'
import PreviewDirection from './PreviewDirection.astro'
import PreviewRefs from './PreviewRefs.astro'
import PreviewView f
